docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY (CORRECTED: SAN MATEO COUNTY) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT TOLEDO, MARVIN

RETURN OF WRIT ISSUED ON 11-30-16 TO SAN MATEO COUNTY RETURNED BY SHERIFFS AS UNSATISFIED. SHERIFFS RETURN. ORIGINAL WRIT WAS NOT ATTACHED. CREDITOR STATES HE DOES NOT HAVE THE ORIGINAL WRIT THAT WAS ISSUED ON 11-30-16. WRIT RETURN FILED AND SCANNED ON 6-16-17 CONTAINS THE LEAD SHEET ONLY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, JONATHAN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT TOLEDO, MARVIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GONZALES, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT TOLEDO, MARVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES, JONATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOLEDO, MARVIN $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 INTEREST, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,435.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $146.81 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, JONATHAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $60.00) SERVED MAY-23-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TOLEDO, MARVIN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $410.32 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT TOLEDO, MARVIN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TOLEDO, MARVIN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TOLEDO, MARVIN
